midi-qol.ResetDefaults.Name: Reset All Settings
midi-qol.ResetDefaults.Title: Reset All Settings to Defaults
midi-qol.ResetDefaults.Content: This will reset ALL midi-qol settings to their default values. This includes ConfigSettings and all game settings. This action cannot be undone. Are you sure you want to continue?
midi-qol.ResetDefaults.Hint: Reset all midi-qol settings to their default values
midi-qol.DamageImmunities.Name: Apply Damage immunities
midi-qol.DamageImmunities.Hint: When using midi-qol damage buttons or auto applying damage apply target's damage immunity/vulnerabilities/resistances. All damage types are checked.
midi-qol.WorldKeyMappings.Name: World vs Client Key Configuration
midi-qol.WorldKeyMappings.Blurb1: Key mappings are defined per client. Each player can have different key mappings. To force all clients to have the same key mappings use one of the available modules to enforce common settings.
midi-qol.WorldKeyMappings.Blurb2: I have tested 'Force Client Controls' with success
midi-qol.SpeedAbilityRolls.Name: Enable Speed Ability (save/check/skill) Rolls
midi-qol.ShowItemDetails.Name: Show Item details in chat card
midi-qol.ShowItemDetails.Hint: If set the item details will be displayed in the chat card. You can use the DND5E system setting to auto hide the description
midi-qol.AutoRollAttack.Name: When item is rolled, automatically roll the attack if there is one
midi-qol.AutoRollAttack.Hint: When the attack is rolled the auto fast forward roll settings are used to decide what to do
midi-qol.AutoFastForward.Name: Auto fast forward rolls
midi-qol.AutoFastForward.Hint: When rolling attack or damage always fast forward rolls also applies when clicking on attack/damage buttons
midi-qol.AutoCheckHit.Name: Auto check if attack hits target
midi-qol.AutoCheckHit.Hint: Check if an attack roll hits selected targets - damage is rolled if one or more targets is hit and auto roll damage is enabled. If disabled midi-qol will assume the attack hits and continue rolling.
midi-qol.RequiresTargets.Name: Require targets to be selected
midi-qol.RequiresTargets.Hint: Require tokens to be targeted before rolls. Never means never require targets to be set, In Combat means only in combat and always whenever an item with targets is rolled.
midi-qol.AutoApplyDamage.Name: Auto apply damage to target
midi-qol.AutoApplyDamage.Hint: Auto apply damage to hit targets (if auto check hits on) or targets user has selected
midi-qol.DamageCardStyle.Name: Damage card style
midi-qol.PlayerDamageCard.Name: Show a player's damage card
midi-qol.PlayerDamageCard.Hint: A simpler version of the damage card. Only displayed if the GM card is displayed. Card is not shown to the GM
midi-qol.PlayerCardDamageDifferent.Name: Display the player damage card if the rolled damage does not match the applied damage for some target
midi-qol.ItemRollButtons.Name: Add attack/damage buttons to item inventory list
midi-qol.ItemRollButtons.Hint: Add Roll Buttons to item description - these buttons support ctrl/alt/shift to skip the dialog
midi-qol.AddChatDamageButtons.Name: Add damage buttons to chat message
midi-qol.AddChatDamageButtons.Hint: Enable the dnd5e damage tray on chat messages.
midi-qol.AutoRollDamage.Name: Auto roll Damage
midi-qol.AutoRollDamage.Hint: Automatically roll Damage when an attack roll is made. If auto roll damage is set to attack-hits midi will roll damage if no targets are selected, the attack hits (see auto check hits) or hits are not being checked
midi-qol.AutoCheckSaves.Name: Auto check Saves
midi-qol.AutoCheckSaves.Hint: Automatically check saving throws when a saving throw is required. If disabled midi will assume that all targets failed their save.
midi-qol.DisplaySaveDC.Name: Display Saving throw DC
midi-qol.DisplaySaveDC.Hint: If false hide the DC of the saving throw from the players (Merge card only)
midi-qol.AutoRemoveTargets.Name: Un-target at end of turn
midi-qol.AutoRemoveTargets.Hint: At the end of you turn choose which targets to automatically un-target
midi-qol.noItemNamed: Your selected token does not have an item named
midi-qol.noTokens: Cannot apply effect - no token targeted
midi-qol.HideNPCNames.Name: Hide token names
midi-qol.HideNPCNames.Hint: Hide token names in hit/save chat messages
midi-qol.AutoTarget.Name: Auto target on template draw
midi-qol.AutoTarget.Hint: When placing a template (e.g. spell) auto target tokens inside the template. If 'Center + Levels' is set in ranged targeting Levels Volumetric Templates will be used (if installed)
midi-qol.noGM: No GM user connected cannot apply effects/update Hit Points
midi-qol.showGM.Name: GM Sees all whispered messages
midi-qol.showGM.Hint: GM sees all whispered messages sent even if the game settings say the GM won't see them
midi-qol.PreferredGM.Name: Preferred GM
midi-qol.PreferredGM.Hint: Preferred GM for socket calls. If 'none' the first gm on the current scene will be used.
midi-qol.ColoredBorders.Name: Colored Border Messages
midi-qol.ColoredBorders.Hint: Each chat message has a border in the player characters color
midi-qol.AutoEffects.Name: Auto apply item effects
midi-qol.AutoEffects.Hint: Automatically apply item active effects to targets if they are hit, failed a save or don't get a save. Works better with about-time and/or times-up as well.

midi-qol.AutoEffectsOptions.applyNoButton: Apply effects do not show button

midi-qol.RangeTarget.Name: Auto target for radius/emanation spells/attacks
midi-qol.RangeTarget.Hint: Auto target for radius/emanation targets if the target type is creature/enemy/ally
midi-qol.PlayerRollSaves.Name: Prompt Players to Roll Saves
midi-qol.PlayerRollSaves.Hint: Players Roll saves. None means midi will roll the save. Otherwise, the player will get a whispered chat message or Monk's Token bar prompt.
midi-qol.rollNPCSaves.Name: Prompt GM to Roll Saves (Unlinked)
midi-qol.rollNPCLinkedSaves.Name: Prompt GM to Roll Saves (Linked)
midi-qol.rollNPCSaves.Hint: Auto means the midi will roll the save for the Actor. Otherwise, the GM will be prompted according to the setting.
midi-qol.PlayerSaveTimeout.Name: Timeout before rolling for players
midi-qol.PlayerSaveTimeout.Hint: How long to wait before taking over the player's save for them in seconds
midi-qol.PreRollChecks.Name: Experimental: Apply checks before doing speed/macro roll
midi-qol.PreRollChecks.Hint: Experimental: Checks before doing an item roll; currently in range and roller has > 0 HP
midi-qol.noTargets: You must target a token before rolling the attack
midi-qol.wrongNumberTargets: You must target at most {allowedTargets} token(s) before rolling the attack
midi-qol.UseTokenNames.Name: Chat cards use token name
midi-qol.UseTokenNames.Hint: Chat card titles and target names use the token name rather than the actor name
midi-qol.CriticalDamage.Name: Choose critical damage for Players
midi-qol.CriticalDamage.Hint: DND5e Settings Only - standard dnd5e critical roll, Max Normal Damage - base weapon dice only (no critical dice) but all maximised, Max Critical Dice - critical dice maximised, Max All Dice - item + critical dice maximised, double dice value - result of dice x2, Explode Critical Dice - roll normal critical exploding any critical dice, Only Item Extra Critical - the only bonus damage for critical is from the item extra critical field, Max Base Roll Crit - use maximum base damage then roll critical dice as usual
midi-qol.CriticalDamageGM.Name: Choose critical damage for GM

midi-qol.CriticalDamageChoices.maxDamageExplode: Max base damage and explode critical dice
midi-qol.CriticalDamageChoices.bestOfTwo: Roll damage die twice and pick the highest

midi-qol.MergeCardCondensed.Name: Condense Attack/Damage Rolls
midi-qol.MergeCardCondensed.Hint: Conserve a little chat log space by making attack and damage rolls smaller
midi-qol.AddSheetButtons.Name: Add Item/Activity Buttons
midi-qol.AddSheetButtons.Hint: Add quick roll buttons (Info, Attack, Damage) to items and activities on character sheets
midi-qol.DisplayItemProperties.Name: Display Item Properties
midi-qol.DisplayItemProperties.Hint: Display item properties in the chat card. Disabling saves some chat card space.
midi-qol.CheckSaveText.Name: Search item description
midi-qol.CheckSaveText.Hint: Search item description for save type - 'half as much damage' and if present spell does 1/2 damage on save. If unchecked assume a save does default save modifier damage
midi-qol.noAttackRoll: You must roll the attack before rolling the damage
midi-qol.Hint: Configure the various workflow settings for midi-qol. Be warned there are lots of them
midi-qol.DiceSound.Name: Attack Roll
midi-qol.DiceSounds.Hint: Sound to play for different sorts of rolls. ONLY applies to the combo card
midi-qol.CustomSoundsPlaylist.Name: Sound Playlist
midi-qol.WeaponUseSound.Name: Weapon Use
midi-qol.WeaponUseSoundRanged.Name: Weapon Use (Ranged)
midi-qol.SpellUseSound.Name: Spell Use
midi-qol.PotionUseSound.Name: Potion Use
midi-qol.SpellUseSoundRanged.Name: Spell Use (Ranged)
midi-qol.ItemUseSound.Name: Item Use
midi-qol.AutoFastForwardAbilityRolls.Hin: Clicking on an ability to start a check/save or a skill roll will auto fast forward
midi-qol.UseCustomSounds.Name: Enable midi-qol custom sounds
midi-qol.UseCustomSounds.Hint: If set will override system sounds. Configure sounds from the 'Configure Midi Custom Sounds' Application
midi-qol:Debug.Name: Enable Debug
midi-qol:Debug.Hint: 'Warnings' gives an overview of activity, 'debug' adds more info and 'all' turns on CONFIG.debug.hooks as well

expandedHints.none: No automatic hit checking. Hits must be adjudicated manually by the GM.
expandedHints.all: Midi-qol automatically checks attack rolls against target AC. All players see hit/miss results.
expandedHints.whisper: Midi-qol automatically checks attack rolls against target AC. Only the GM sees hit/miss results.
expandedHints.gmOnly: Midi-qol automatically checks attack rolls against target AC. Only the GM sees the attack roll and results.

expandedHints.none: Templates do not auto-target tokens. Players must select targets manually.
expandedHints.always: All tokens within the template area are automatically targeted, regardless of walls.
expandedHints.alwaysIgnoreIncapacitated: All tokens within the template area are targeted, but incapacitated and dead tokens are excluded.
expandedHints.alwaysIgnoreDefeated: All tokens within the template area are targeted, but dead/defeated tokens are excluded.
expandedHints.wallsBlock: Tokens within the template area are targeted only if there is no wall between the template origin and the token.
expandedHints.wallsBlockIgnoreIncapacitated: Tokens are targeted if no wall blocks them from the template origin. Incapacitated and dead tokens are excluded.
expandedHints.wallsBlockIgnoreDefeated: Tokens are targeted if no wall blocks them from the template origin. Dead/defeated tokens are excluded.
expandedHints.walledtemplates: Delegates targeting to the Walled Templates module, which reshapes the template area around walls. Requires the Walled Templates module.

midi-qol.autoCheckSavesOptions.all: Save - All see result + save total
midi-qol.autoCheckSavesOptions.whisper: Save - only GM sees results + rolls

expandedHints.none: No automatic saving throws. Saves must be rolled manually.
expandedHints.allNoRoll: Midi-qol auto-rolls saving throws. All players see pass/fail results but not the roll total.
expandedHints.all: Midi-qol auto-rolls saving throws. All players see pass/fail results and the save total.
expandedHints.allShow: Midi-qol auto-rolls saving throws. All players see pass/fail results, save total, and the full roll breakdown.
expandedHints.whisper: Midi-qol auto-rolls saving throws. Only the GM sees the results and roll details.
expandedHints.gmOnly: Midi-qol auto-rolls saving throws. Only the GM sees anything related to saving throws.

midi-qol.rollNPCSavesOptions.autoDialog: Auto roll and show roll dialog

expandedHints.none: GM is prompted to roll saves via a chat message button.
expandedHints.auto: Saves are auto-rolled with no GM interaction.
expandedHints.autoDialog: Saves are auto-rolled but the roll configuration dialog is shown first, allowing modification.
expandedHints.mtb: Saves are rolled via the Monks Token Bar interface. Requires the Monks Token Bar module.
expandedHints.ftb: Saves are rolled via the Flash Token Bar pop-up. Requires the Flash Rolls 5e module.
expandedHints.rer: Saves are rolled via Ripper's Epic Rolls interface. Requires the Epic Rolls 5e module.

midi-qol.playerRollSavesOptions.noneDialogPublic: Auto roll and show roll dialog (public roll)
midi-qol.playerRollSavesOptions.noneDialogPrivate: Auto roll and show roll dialog (private roll)
midi-qol.playerRollSavesOptions.noneDialogSelf: Auto roll and show roll dialog (self roll)
midi-qol.playerRollSavesOptions.noneDialogBlind: Auto roll and show roll dialog (blind roll)

expandedHints.none: Saves are auto-rolled with no player interaction. Roll shown privately (GM only).
expandedHints.nonePublic: Saves are auto-rolled with no player interaction. Roll shown publicly to all players.
expandedHints.noneDialogPublic: Saves are auto-rolled but the roll configuration dialog is shown first, allowing modification. Roll shown publicly.
expandedHints.noneDialogPrivate: Saves are auto-rolled but the roll configuration dialog is shown first, allowing modification. Roll shown privately (GM only).
expandedHints.noneDialogSelf: Saves are auto-rolled but the roll configuration dialog is shown first, allowing modification. Roll shown only to the rolling player.
expandedHints.noneDialogBlind: Saves are auto-rolled but the roll configuration dialog is shown first, allowing modification. Roll sent as a blind roll.
expandedHints.chat: Players are prompted to roll saves via a chat message button.
expandedHints.mtb: Players roll saves via the Monks Token Bar interface. Requires the Monks Token Bar module.
expandedHints.ftb: Players roll saves via the Flash Token Bar pop-up. Requires the Flash Rolls 5e module.
expandedHints.rer: Players roll saves via Ripper's Epic Rolls interface. Requires the Epic Rolls 5e module.

midi-qol.AutoRemoveTargetsOptions.all: Un-target all at end of turn

midi-qol.hideRollDetailsOptions.detailsDSN: Roll Formula but show DSN roll
midi-qol.hideRollDetailsOptions.d20DamageDSN: Show attack D20 + Damage total + Damage DSN
midi-qol.hideRollDetailsOptions.attackTotalOnly: Show the attack roll total only

expandedHints.none: Hide nothing — players see all roll details.
expandedHints.detailsDSN: Hide the roll formulas but still roll DSN dice so players see the animation.
expandedHints.details: Hide the roll formula and don't show DSN dice.
expandedHints.d20Only: Show the attack d20 roll and damage total only.
expandedHints.d20DamageDSN: Show the attack d20 roll and damage total, and show DSN animation for the damage dice.
expandedHints.hitDamage: Show hit/miss plus the damage total.
expandedHints.hitCriticalDamage: Show hit/miss/critical/fumble plus the damage total.
expandedHints.attackTotalOnly: Show the attack roll total only.
expandedHints.d20AttackOnly: Show the d20 attack dice only.
expandedHints.all: Hide all roll details from the players.

midi-qol.GMAttackDisplay.Name: GM Attack Roll Display
midi-qol.GMAttackDisplay.Hint: What players see for GM attack rolls.

expandedHints.full: Players see the complete attack roll including formula and dice breakdown.
expandedHints.hideFormula: Players see the roll result but not the formula.
expandedHints.d20Only: Players see only the d20 result.
expandedHints.attackTotal: Players see only the attack total.
expandedHints.hitMiss: Players see only whether the attack hit or missed.
expandedHints.hitMissCrit: Players see hit/miss with critical/fumble distinction.
expandedHints.hidden: Players see no attack roll information.

midi-qol.GMDamageDisplay.Name: GM Damage Roll Display
midi-qol.GMDamageDisplay.Hint: What players see for GM damage rolls.

expandedHints.full: Players see the complete damage roll including formula and dice breakdown.
expandedHints.totalOnly: Players see only the damage total.
expandedHints.hidden: Players see no damage roll information.

midi-qol.GMAttackDsn.Name: Attack Roll DSN
midi-qol.GMAttackDsn.Hint: Dice So Nice animation for GM attack rolls as seen by players.
midi-qol.GMDamageDsn.Name: Damage Roll DSN
midi-qol.GMDamageDsn.Hint: Dice So Nice animation for GM damage rolls as seen by players.

expandedHints.show: Players see the full DSN dice animation.
expandedHints.none: No DSN dice animation shown to players.

midi-qol.HideRollDetails.Name: GM Roll details hiding (Legacy)
midi-qol.HideRollDetails.Hint: Deprecated — use the granular settings below instead.
midi-qol.ForceHideRoll.Name: Really Hide private/blind/self-rolls
midi-qol.ForceHideRoll.Hint: Display nothing to non-recipients for private/blind/self-rolls. Thanks to felix.mueller.86@web.de
midi-qol.EnableWorkflow.Name: Enable roll automation support
midi-qol.EnableWorkflow.Hint: If enabled automation of rolls can be configured in the Workflow Settings panel
midi-qol.Debug.Name: Enable debug
midi-qol.Debug.Hint: Set to None unless you want to fill up the console log. All enables CONFIG.hooks.debug
midi-qol.AllowUseMacro.Name: Add item on use macro to sheet
midi-qol.AllowActorUseMacro.Name: Add actor on use macro to sheet
midi-qol.AllowUseMacro.Hint: When enabled adds a macro name field which will be called on use. See the Readme for the details

midi-qol.onUseMacroOptions.preItemRoll: Called before the item is rolled (*)
midi-qol.onUseMacroOptions.templatePlaced: Only called once a template is placed
midi-qol.onUseMacroOptions.isTargeted: Target is targeted but before item is rolled
midi-qol.onUseMacroOptions.isPreAttacked: Target is about to be attacked, before reactions
midi-qol.onUseMacroOptions.preTargetSave: Target is about to roll a saving throw
midi-qol.onUseMacroOptions.preTargetDamageApplication: Target is about to be damaged by an item
midi-qol.onUseMacroOptions.postTargetEffectApplication: Target has an effect applied by a rolled item
midi-qol.onUseMacroOptions.isDamaged: Target is damaged by an attack

midi-qol.DragDropTarget.Name: Drag and Drop Targeting
midi-qol.DragDropTarget.Hint: Allow dragging an item onto a token to attack it
midi-qol.AutoAttack.Name: Auto roll attack
midi-qol.AutoDamage.Name: Auto roll damage
midi-qol.AutoFastForwardAttack.Name: Auto fast forward attack
midi-qol.AutoFastForwardDamage.Name: Auto fast forward damage
midi-qol.ItemList: Choose items which display details on item card
midi-qol.RollOtherDamage.Name: Roll Other damage formula for rwak/mwak
midi-qol.RollOtherSpellDamage.Name: Roll Other damage formula for spells
midi-qol.RollOtherDamage.Hint:
Off Don't roll Other damage automatically.
Condition True & Save Present If the condition is not blank and evaluates to true OR the item has a save and the activation condition is not false.
Condition roll the Other damage if the other damage condition is empty or evaluates to true
midi-qol.RemoveButtons.Name: Remove chat card buttons after roll
midi-qol.ActiveConcentrationSpell.Title: Active Concentration Spell
midi-qol.ActiveConcentrationSpell.Conten: You are already concentrating on @NAME@. End concentration and continue?
You are already concentrating. End concentration and continue?
midi-qol.ConcentrationAutomation.Name: Enable Midi-qol Concentration Automation
midi-qol.ConcentrationAutomation.Hint:
If enabled midi will handle concentration management and you must disable DnD5e concentration.
If DnD5e concentration is not disabled this setting will be force set to unchecked.
Using DnD5e concentration is recommended and the rest of the settings will work with Dnd5e concentration
midi-qol.SingleConcentrationRoll.Name: Single Concentration Check
midi-qol.SingleConcentrationRoll.Hint: If enabled and the attack is rolling normal damage + a save + other/versatile damage only roll a single concentration check for the combined damage
If enabled loss of temporary HP will trigger a concentration check.
Disabling this is homebrew. Rules as written DND5E is that temp hp damage triggers a concentration check
midi-qol.RemoveConcentrationEffects.Name: Remove concentration when effects removed
midi-qol.RemoveConcentrationEffects.Hint: Check when effects (effects & templates) are removed. If all effects and templates for the concentration spell/feature have been removed remove concentration
midi-qol.SavesBase: If target saves, the item does:
midi-qol.SavesBonus: If target saves, Bonus Damage macros do:
midi-qol.SavesOther: If target saves, Other Formula does:
midi-qol.DamageMacro.Name: Bonus Damage Macros
midi-qol.DamageMacro.Hint: Comma separated list of macros to call when calculating damage which will be applied when calculating damage to targets
midi-qol.AttackMacro.Name: Attack Bonus Macros
midi-qol.AttackMacro.Hint: Comma separated list of macros to call when calculating attack roll which will be applied when checking if the attack hit the targets
midi-qol.OptionalRules.Name: Optional Game Rules
midi-qol.OptionalRules.Hint: DND5E Game rules that you may wish to enable. Generally, don't work with better rolls.
midi-qol.InvisAdvantage.Name: Unseen/Invisible attackers have advantage/disadvantage on attacks
midi-qol.RAW2014Invisible.Hint: RAW (2014) Invisible condition always grants adv/disadv; other senses (blindsight, tremorsense) negate unseen adv/disadv.
midi-qol.RAW2024Invisible.Hint: RAW (2024) Only grants adv/disadv if the other creature cannot see you — blindsight/truesight negate, but tremorsense does not.
midi-qol.InvisVision.Name: Force vision when checking
midi-qol.InvisVision.Hint:
Checked behaves as if all tokens have vision enabled.
Unchecked tokens without vision can see everything
midi-qol.HiddenAdvantage.Name: Hidden attackers have adv/disadv on attacks
midi-qol.HiddenAdvantage.Hint: Hidden attackers have advantage on attacks. Disadvantage if the target is hidden
midi-qol.CantSeeAdvantage.Hint: Use Token Vision Invisible attackers have advantage on targets who can't see them. Disadvantage if they can't see the target
midi-qol.CheckRange.Name: Check weapon range when attacking
midi-qol.NearbyFoe.Name: Ranged attacks when a foe is closer than this have disadvantage. 0 disables
midi-qol.WallsBlockRange.Name: Walls block ranged attacks
midi-qol.WallsBlockRange.Hint: If a cover module determines total cover, the attack is blocked.

expandedHints.none: Walls do not block ranged attack checks.
expandedHints.center: Check line of sight from token center to target center. If a wall blocks the line, the attack is blocked.
expandedHints.centerLevels: Center-to-center check using the Levels module to determine wall blocking LOS. Also uses Levels volumetric templates for template targeting. Requires the Levels module.
expandedHints.levelsautocover: Use the Levels Auto Cover module to calculate cover. Total cover blocks the attack. Requires the Levels Auto Cover module.
expandedHints.simbuls-cover-calculator: Use Simbul's Cover Calculator module to calculate cover. Total cover blocks the attack. Requires the Simbul's Cover Calculator module.
expandedHints.tokencover: Use the Alternative Token Cover module to calculate cover. Total cover blocks the attack. Requires the Alternative Token Cover module.
expandedHints.simplecover5e: Use the Simple Cover 5e module to calculate cover. Total cover blocks the attack. Requires the Simple Cover 5e module.

midi-qol.NearbyAllyRanged.Name: (House Rule) Ranged Attacks at foes near allies have disadvantage
midi-qol.CoverCalculation.Name: Calculate Cover
midi-qol.CoverCalculation.Hint: Calculate AC bonus for targets in cover - settings taken from the selected module
midi-qol.NearbyAllyRanged.Hint: Ranged Attacks with allies nearby (5 feet) to the target have disadvantage for targets smaller than this (w*h). 0 disables
midi-qol.Incapacitated.Name: When an Incapacitated actor takes an action, MidiQOL should
midi-qol.RemoveHiddenInvis.Name: Attacking removes hidden (use CE/CV/CUB/core foundry specialStatus )
midi-qol.CriticalSaves.Name: (House Rule) Critical/Fumble always succeed/fail for saving throws
midi-qol.MaxDRValue.Name: (House rule) Enabling this means that only the most effective Damage Reduction will apply. Off means DR accumulates
midi-qol.DRAllPerDamageDetail.Name: (House Rule) DRALL (DR.rwak/...) is deducted from BOTH attack damage and Other damage
midi-qol.DRAllPerDamageDetail.Hint: Unchecked means DRALL applies just once to the total damage
midi-qol.KeepRollStats.Name: Keep Roll Statistics
midi-qol.KeepRollStats.Hint: Record attack and damage roll data for actors
midi-qol.SaveStatsEvery.Name: Save statistics Every
midi-qol.SaveStatsEvery.Hint: Save statistics every N rolls. Each attack and damage counts as a roll. Suggest 10-20 or greater
midi-qol.PlayerStatsOnly.Name: Player statistics only
midi-qol.PlayerStatsOnly.Hint: Only keep statistics for player owned actors
midi-qol.DefaultSaveMult.Name: Default saving throw multiplier
midi-qol.DefaultSaveMult.Hint: If there are no other modifiers a saving throw will do this fraction of the damage of the original attack. Default 0.5, half damage on save. You should only change this if you know how multipliers work
midi-qol.RequireMagical.Name: Require 'Magical' property
midi-qol.RequireMagical.Hint:
Magical Property is either the dnd5e property Magical or the midi-qol Magic Damage property. If set the item does magical damage.
Off non-weapons do magical damage by default, weapons do magical damage if the item's magical property set.
Non Spell means only spells do magical damage by default.
All no item does magical damage by default
midi-qol.DoConcentrationCheck.Name: Force a concentration save when damage taken
midi-qol.DoConcentrationCheck.Hint:
Chat Message Only display a chat message with a button (dnd5e default behaviour and required dnd5e concentration)
Chat message + Auto Roll display a chat message and auto roll the save (requires dnd5e concentration)
Roll Concentration Item roll a concentration item check (midi standard behaviour)
midi-qol.RemoveConcentration.Name: Remove concentration on failed concentration save
midi-qol.UsePlayerPortrait.Name: Use Actor portrait in chat cards
midi-qol.UsePlayerPortrait.Hint: For Actors of type character use the actor portrait instead of the token image in midi-qol chat cards
midi-qol.DistanceIncludesHeight.Name: Include height difference in distance calculations
midi-qol.DistanceMeasurement.Name: Distance measurement method
midi-qol.DistanceMeasurement.Hint: How to measure distance between tokens. 'Default' uses Foundry's core measurement (center-to-center via measurePath). 'Grid Square Centers' uses the closest grid square centers with midi-qol processing. 'Token Perimeters' uses the closest points on token edges (more accurate for large tokens).
midi-qol.NoSocketLib: Midi-qol requires socketlib installed and enabled
midi-qol.chatlogPruneDeprecated: Midi-qol's built-in chat log pruning is deprecated. It will be removed in version 13.1.
midi-qol.chatlogPruneInstallHint: Please install and activate the 'chatlog-prune' module. Remember to activate chat log pruning in the module settings.
midi-qol.chatlogPruneEnableHint: The 'chatlog-prune' module is installed but chat log pruning is not enabled. Please activate it in the chatlog-prune module settings.
midi-qol.ExportConfig: Export midi-qol settings to json file
midi-qol.ImportConfig: Import midi-qol settings from json file
midi-qol.ExportJSon: Export Roll Stats to Json file
midi-qol.ExportCSV: Export Roll Stats to CSV file

midi-qol.AutoCEEffectsOptions.itempri: Apply activity effects, if absent apply CE
midi-qol.AutoCEEffectsOptions.cepri: Apply CE, if absent apply activity effects

midi-qol.AutoCEEffects.Name: Apply Convenient Effects
midi-qol.AutoCEEffects.Hint: Apply convenient effects which match activity name (if no match, item name) when item used. Requires auto apply active effects enabled as well.
midi-qol.NoChangelogs: Midi-qol supports and recommends the ChangeLogs or Module Manager+ modules to show you any changes since you last updated
midi-qol.ActiveDefence.Name: Active Defence
midi-qol.ActiveDefenceModifier.Name: Active Defence Modifier
midi-qol.ActiveDefenceModifier.Hint:
The active defence DC will be `attack bonus + this modifier` and the active defence roll will be `1d20 + AC - (22 - this modifier)`.
The value does not matter, just choose what makes the rolls look good to you.
Suggested values are 12, 10, or 0.
midi-qol.ActiveDefence.Hint: Instead of GM rolling 'To Hit', players make a defence roll.
midi-qol.ActiveDefenceDC.Name: Show Active Defence DC
midi-qol.ActiveDefenceDC.Hint: If set the active defence DC will be shown in the chat card
midi-qol.ActiveDefenceShow.Name: Default display for active defence rolls
midi-qol.ActiveDefenceShow.Hint: If set to 'Self Roll' the roll will be hidden from the GM regardless of other settings
midi-qol.GMHide3dDice.Name: Hide GM attack/damage/saving throw 3d dice rolls - overrides other settings (merge card only)
midi-qol.GhostRolls.Name: For attack/damage rolls display with 'dice so nice ghost rolls' rather than hiding the roll (merge card only)
midi-qol.ConsumeResource.Name: Skip consume resource dialog
midi-qol.ConsumeResource.Hint: If set skip the consume resource dialog (consuming a default resource/spell slot and place templates) unless no spell slot of the correct level is available, or the Advantage + Disadvantage keys are pressed when clicking
midi-qol.ChallengeModeArmor.Name: Enable Challenge Mode Armor Class
midi-qol.ChallengeModeArmor.Hint: Implements the challenge mode armor rules - see the readme for more information
midi-qol.ChallengeModeArmorScale.Hint: Implements a modified challenge mode armor rules - see the readme for more information
midi-qol.ChallengeModeArmorScaleNoAR.Hin: Implements a modified challenge mode armor rules but no AR reducing incoming damage - see the readme for more information
midi-qol.ItemActivationCondition.Name: Item use allowed if true (Deprecated)
midi-qol.ReactionActivationCondition.Nam: Reaction will be triggered if true (Deprecated)
midi-qol.OtherActivationCondition.Name: Other Formula will be rolled if true (Deprecated)
midi-qol.ddbGL.Name: Enable ddb-game-log support
midi-qol.ddbGL.Hint: Accept attack/damage/saving throws from ddb-game-log to trigger midi workflows in foundry
midi-qol.ShowReactionChatMessage.Name: Show Chat prompt for reactions
midi-qol.reactionFlavorHit: {actorName} is hit by {itemName} and can use a reaction
midi-qol.reactionFlavorTargeted: {actorName} is targeted by {itemName} and can use a reaction
midi-qol.reactionFlavorMiss: {actorName} is missed by {itemName} and can use a reaction
midi-qol.reactionFlavorCrit: {actorName} is critically hit by {itemName} and can use a reaction
midi-qol.reactionFlavorFumble: {actorName} is attacked by {itemName} which fumbled and can use a reaction
midi-qol.reactionFlavorHeal: {actorName} is healed by {itemName} and can use a reaction
midi-qol.reactionFlavorDamage: {actorName} is damaged by {itemName} and can use a reaction
midi-qol.reactionFlavorAttacked: {actorName} is attacked by {itemName} and can use a reaction
midi-qol.reactionFlavorPreAttack: {actorName} is about to be attacked by {itemName} and can use a reaction
midi-qol.reactionFlavorSave: {actorName} must save because of {itemName} and can use a reaction
midi-qol.reactionFlavorSaveFail: {actorName} failed a save because of {itemName} and can use a reaction
midi-qol.reactionFlavorSaveSuccess: {actorName} succeeded on a save because of {itemName} and can use a reaction
midi-qol.AccelKeysOverride.Name: Midi-qol speed keys override others
midi-qol.AccelKeysOverride.Hint: If set midi will always use the speed key mappings for advantage/disadvantage, instead of deferring to better rolls (for example)
midi-qol._comment for translators_DeferT: The text below is searched for by midi in the onUseMacro field in item data. If you change it every item with an onUseMacro will need to be changed to match
midi-qol._comment for translators_ItemMa: The text below is searched for by midi in the onUseMacro field in item data. If you change it every item with an onUseMacro will need to be changed to match
midi-qol.TargetConfirmationConfig.Name: Target Confirmation
midi-qol.TargetConfirmationConfig.Hint: When rolling an item confirm targets before completing
midi-qol.TargetConfirmation.Name: Target Confirmation
midi-qol.TargetConfirmation.Blurb:
Select up to {targetCount} {targetType}.
Shift-Click a token to add to the target list.
Right click in the list to remove a target
midi-qol.TargetConfirmation.BlurbAny:
Select any number of targets.
Shift-Click a token to add to the target list.
Right click in the list to remove a target
midi-qol.AddDead.Name: Add effect when HP = 0
midi-qol.AddWounded.Name: Add effect when hp falls below %
midi-qol.AddWounded.Hint: Add Selected status when HP are less than or equal to specified percentage of max. 0 disables
midi-qol.debugCallTiming.Name: Log execution timing
midi-qol.debugCallTiming.Hint: Provide some log information about how long things take
midi-qol.RollToggle.Hint: Toggle fast/auto roll setting for attack/damage/ability Checks while held
midi-qol.RollToggle.Name: Roll Toggle
midi-qol.FastForward.Hint: Fast forward all rolls while held
midi-qol.FastForward.Name: Fast Forward
midi-qol.KeysCritical.Hint: Roll critical damage (from chat card only)
midi-qol.FixStickyKeys.Name: Fix sticky alt/ctrl/shift
midi-qol.FixStickyKeys.Hint: If set midi will attempt to resolve alt/ctrl/shift being stuck 'on'
midi-qol.DisplaySaveAdvantage.Name: Display if save had Advantage/Disadvantage
midi-qol.QuickSettingsBlurb:
Quick settings let you set a combination of settings at once.
When one of the buttons below is pushed the changes are immediately made to your settings
A list of changes is displayed once the application is complete
Suggestions for improvements welcome
midi-qol.Reaction.Title: Reaction Processing
midi-qol.ShowReactionAttackRoll.Name: Show attack roll
midi-qol.DoReactions.Name: Check PLAYER reactions
midi-qol.DoReactions.Hint: Give an attacked actor the option to use a reaction before adjudicating the roll. Reactions when hit require auto check hits enabled. Damage reactions if applying damage
midi-qol.GMDoReactions.Name: Check NPC/GM reactions
midi-qol.ReactionTimeout.Name: Reaction check timeout
midi-qol.ReactionTimeout.Hint: How long to wait before assuming no reaction has been taken
midi-qol.NoOptionalRules.Name: No optional rules
midi-qol.NoOptionalRules.Hint: Disable optional rules for this roll
midi-qol.RecordAOO.Name: Record Attacks of Opportunity
midi-qol.RecordAOO.Hint: When an actor makes an attack and it is not their turn in the combat tracker - mark their reaction used
midi-qol.EnforceReactions.Name: Enforce Reactions
midi-qol.EnforceReactions.Hint: Prompt when using reaction items if a reaction has already been used this round
midi-qol.EnforceBonusActions.Name: Enforce Bonus Actions
midi-qol.EnforceBonusActions.Hint: Prompt when using bonus action items if a bonus action already used this round
midi-qol.EnforceReactions.Title: Reaction Used
midi-qol.EnforceReactions.Content: You have used your reaction this round. Do you want to proceed anyway?
midi-qol.EnforceBonusActions.Title: Bonus Action Used
midi-qol.EnforceBonusActions.Content: You have used your bonus action this round. Do you want to proceed anyway?
midi-qol.SoundSettings.Name: Configure Midi Custom Sounds
midi-qol.SoundSettings.Hint: Setup midi-qol custom sounds for item rolls
midi-qol.SoundSettings.Label: Configure Midi Custom Sounds
midi-qol.LaunchSetupWizard.Name: Setup Wizard
midi-qol.LaunchSetupWizard.Label: Launch Setup Wizard
midi-qol.LaunchSetupWizard.Hint: Opens the step-by-step midi-qol configuration wizard
midi-qol.SoundSettingsBlurb:
Getting started...
Choose 'Create Sample playlist, which will create a playlist 'Midi Item Sounds' with a few sounds
Choose `Basic Settings` and tinker
The other create setting add more details/complexity
midi-qol.CheckFlanking.Name: Check Flanking
midi-qol.CheckFlanking.Hint: Check if you and your allies flank the opponent. Gives attacker advantage, applies Flanking condition to attacker, or applies Flanked condition to target. Requires restart if changing to use one of the Midi options.

midi-qol.CheckFlankingOptions.ceflankedNoconga: Convenient Effects Flanked + no conga line

expandedHints.advonly: Flanking grants advantage on melee attacks. No effect or condition is applied to either token.
expandedHints.ceonly: Apply the Convenient Effects 'Flanking' effect to the attacker. Only that attacker gains advantage — other attackers of the same target do not.
expandedHints.midiFlanking: Apply midi-qol's 'Flanking' effect to the attacker. Only that attacker gains advantage — other attackers of the same target do not.
expandedHints.ceflanked: Apply the Convenient Effects 'Flanked' effect to the target. All attackers making melee attacks against the flanked target gain advantage.
expandedHints.midiFlanked: Apply midi-qol's 'Flanked' effect to the target. All attackers making melee attacks against the flanked target gain advantage.
expandedHints.ceflankedNoconga: Apply the Convenient Effects 'Flanked' effect to the target. All melee attackers gain advantage. Already-flanked tokens cannot count as flanking allies (prevents conga lines).
expandedHints.midiFlankedNoConga: Apply midi-qol's 'Flanked' effect to the target. All melee attackers gain advantage. Already-flanked tokens cannot count as flanking allies (prevents conga lines).

midi-qol.FlankingBonus.Name: Flanking Bonus Type
midi-qol.FlankingBonus.Hint: When flanking is detected, grant advantage (default) or reduce the target's effective AC by a fixed amount.
midi-qol.FlankingRequiresVisibility.Name: Flanking requires target can sense flanker
midi-qol.FlankingRequiresVisibility.Hint: When enabled, an ally only counts as a flanker if the target can sense them. Invisible or hidden allies won't contribute to flanking.
midi-qol.ShowFlankingHighlight.Name: Show Flanking Positions
midi-qol.ShowFlankingHighlight.Hint: Highlight grid cells where an ally would create flanking against your current target.
midi-qol.RollAlternate.Name: Move roll formula to tooltip
midi-qol.RollAlternate.Hint: Use alternate roll display on merge card moving the roll formula to the tooltip and optionally add advantage attribution
midi-qol.OptionalCritRule.Name: (House Rule) Critical Roll Margin
midi-qol.OptionalCritRule.Hint: Attack Rolls this much above AC are critical. -1 disables
midi-qol.CriticalNat20.Name: (House Rule) Allow normal critical rolls
midi-qol.CriticalNat20.Hint: A roll above critical threshold is still a critical even if it does not meet the margin requirements
Don't wait for damage roll before expiring attack/hit/action special duration effects
Allow any reaction spell to be used
Do not require available spell slots or preparation when choosing reaction spells
midi-qol.DamageResistanceMultiplier.Name: Resistance reduces damage to
midi-qol.DamageImmunityMultiplier.Name: Immunity reduces damage to
midi-qol.ShowFastForward.Name: Show Fast Forward
midi-qol.ShowFastForward.Hint: Show Fast Forward indicator on attack and damage buttons
midi-qol.AutoRemoveTemplate.Name: Auto remove placed template on spell expiry
midi-qol.AutoRemoveSummonedCreature.Name: Auto remove summoned creatures on item expiry/concentration removal (for dnd5e summons items)
midi-qol.AutoUndoTransformations.Name: Auto undo transformations on effect/concentration expiry/removal
midi-qol.AutoUndoTransformations.Hint: When transforming a target add an effect/concentration to the caster that tracks the transformations and automatically revert the target to their original form on expiry/concentration removal
midi-qol.AttackPerTarget.Name: Roll a separate attack per target
midi-qol.SkillAbilityCheckAdvantage.Name: Ability Check Advantage gives Skill Advantage
midi-qol.SkillAbilityCheckAdvantage.Hint: If an actor has advantage/disadvantage on ability checks, skills based on that ability also have advantage/disadvantage
midi-qol.HighlightSuccess.Name: Color code Hit/Miss/Save Display
midi-qol.HighlightSuccess.Hint: When displaying hits/misses, hits/saves are in green and misses/failed saves in red
midi-qol.HighLightCriticalAttackOnly.Hin: Override dnd5e highlighting attacks hits and misses and only highlight critical/fumble attack rolls
midi-qol.OptionalRuleVitality.Name: (House Rule) Vitality Item
midi-qol.OptionalRuleVitality.Hint: Set to the exact name of an item with uses (case-sensitive, e.g., 'Vitality Pool'). Damage applied to a target with 0 HP reduces the item's uses. When the item's uses reach 0 the target is dead.
midi-qol.OptionalRuleVitalityCondition.H: The condition to apply when vitality reaches 0. Defaults to 'Dead'.
midi-qol.OptionalRuleVitalityDeathRequir: What conditions are required for death when using vitality. 'Vitality Only' means death when vitality=0 (regardless of HP). 'Vitality and HP' means death only when both vitality=0 AND HP=0.
midi-qol.AutoRerollInitiative.Name: Auto reroll initiative
midi-qol.AutoRerollInitiative.Hint: Auto reroll initiative for all combatants at the start of a new round. Warning: can break round/turn effect expiry
midi-qol.RollChecksBlind.Name: Which ability checks are rolled blind
midi-qol.RollSavesBlind.Name: Which ability saves are rolled blind
midi-qol.RollSkillsBlind.Name: Which skill checks are rolled blind

midi-qol.UndoWorkflow.Name: Support undoing item rolls
midi-qol.UndoWorkflow.Hint: If enabled midi will store undo data for all item/activity rolls. Undo via MidiQOL.undoMostRecentWorkflow()
midi-qol.UndoWorkflow.title: Undo workflow
midi-qol.UndoWorkflow.removeFirstWorkflow: Remove Top/Most Recent Workflow From List (WARNING)
midi-qol.UndoWorkflow.undoFirstWorkflow: Undo Top/Most Recent Workflow From List
midi-qol.UndoWorkflow.GMOnly: Only the GM can undo workflows

midi-qol.cubNotSupported: Combat Utility Belt will not be migrated to version 11. Midi will remove support for CUB in midi version 11.1.0

midi-qol.DependentsExplorer.Title: Dependents Explorer
midi-qol.DependentsExplorer.Name: Dependents Explorer
midi-qol.DependentsExplorer.Label: Open Dependents Explorer
midi-qol.DependentsExplorer.Hint: View document dependency relationships tracked by midi-qol
midi-qol.DependentsExplorer.Empty: No dependent documents are currently tracked
midi-qol.DependentsExplorer.NoMatches: No documents match the search filter
midi-qol.DependentsExplorer.ConfirmDeleteParent: Are you sure you want to delete {name} ({type})? This will also delete all its dependents.
midi-qol.DependentsExplorer.ConfirmDeleteDependent: Are you sure you want to delete {name} ({type})?
midi-qol.DependentsExplorer.ConfirmDeleteItemEffect: Are you sure you want to delete the effect {name}? This will permanently remove the effect from the item.

midi-qol.TroubleShooter.Name: Open Trouble Shooter
midi-qol.TroubleShooter.Hint: Trouble shooter to help diagnose problems and collect settings
midi-qol.TroubleShooter.Label: Troubleshooter

midi-qol.EnforceSingleWeaponTarget.Name: Weapons attack single target
midi-qol.EnforceSingleWeaponTarget.Hint: Weapons with no target specification can only attack one target
midi-qol.DisplayBonusRolls.Name: Show before and after optional bonus chat card
midi-qol.DisplayBonusRolls.Hint: Display a chat card with the before and after roll when an optional bonus is applied
midi-qol.MergeCardMulti.Name: Add extra buttons to merge card
midi-qol.MergeCardMulti.Hint: Add buttons for advantage/disadvantage critical/nocritical to the item chart card
midi-qol.ConfirmAttackDamage.Name: Display Confirm Roll Button
midi-qol.ConfirmAttackDamage.Hint: Pause after rolling attack/damage for the player/GM to confirm
midi-qol.AverageDamage.Name: All damage/critical rolls are 'average' results
midi-qol.GriddedGridless.Name: Gridless Grid
midi-qol.GridlessFudge.Name: Fudge factor
midi-qol.GridlessFudge.Hint: Subtract the fudge factor from the measured distance when checking range. Specified in grid scale units, i.e. ft/m
midi-qol.GriddedGridless.Hint: If set midi will use the square grid for all distance calculations in gridless scenes
midi-qol.TargetConfirmation.hasAttack: Confirm targets if rolled item has an attack
midi-qol.TargetConfirmationCreatureTarge: Confirm targets if rolled item has 'creature' target
midi-qol.TargetConfirmationSelfTarget: Confirm targets if self is targeted
midi-qol.TargetConfirmationAoETarget: Confirm targets if item has an AoE
midi-qol.TargetConfirmationRangedAoE: Confirm targets if item has ranged AoE
midi-qol.TargetConfirmationLongRangeTarg: Confirm targets if any target is long range
midi-qol.TargetConfirmationCoveredTarget: Confirm targets if any target has cover
midi-qol.TargetConfirmationMixedDisposit: Confirm targets if targeting allies and hostiles
midi-qol.TargetConfirmationAllies: Confirm targets if any target is an ally
midi-qol.TemplateOutOfRange: Template placement is out of range
midi-qol.SaveDROrder.Name: Damage Reduction Save Order
midi-qol.SaveDROrder.Hint:
Order in which damage reduction is applied.
dm.midi is midi specific damage reduction.
dm is dnd5e damage reduction
midi-qol.WaitingForPreviousWorkflow: Previous roll of {name} has not completed.
midi-qol.ResolvePreviousWorkflow: Choose what to do with the previous roll
midi-qol.ConcentrationIncapacitatedCondi: Remove concentration when incapacitated status applied
Incapacitated, Dead,  Unconscious, Petrified, Paralysed and Stunned remove concentration
midi-qol.AutoCompleteWorkflow.Name: Autocomplete workflow if required
midi-qol.AutoCompleteWorkflow.Hint: Workflows will be marked as complete if rolled before completion, no extra rolls will be performed
midi-qol.SavesBeforeDamage.Name: Roll saves before damage (Experimental)
midi-qol.SavesBeforeDamage.Hint: If enabled saves are rolled before damage is rolled otherwise saves are rolled after damage is rolled
midi-qol.ConstrainTemplatePlacement.Name: Constrain Template Placement
midi-qol.ConstrainTemplatePlacement.Hint: Constrains template placement: Cone/ray templates with range Self/None are anchored to the caster's token border. All templates are clamped to stay within the activity's range during preview.
midi-qol.TemplateSnapping.Name: Template Grid Snapping
midi-qol.TemplateSnapping.Hint: Controls grid snapping when placing templates. Full grid snaps to grid intersections only. Half grid also snaps to grid square centers and side midpoints.
midi-qol.AddFakeDice.Name: Add fake dice to GM Dice So Nice rolls
midi-qol.AddFakeDice.Hint: Adds random extra dice to the DSN animation so players can't count dice to deduce modifiers.
midi-qol.MidiFieldsTab.Name: Display Midi item fields in a separate tab
midi-qol.UndoChatColor.Name: Undo Chat Cards Color
midi-qol.UndoChatColor.Hint: Delete means remove the chat card on undo. Otherwise, the undone chats are recoloured
midi-qol.WaitForDamageApplication.Name: Wait for damage application
midi-qol.WaitForDamageApplication.Hint: Wait for the GM client to apply damage before completing the workflow. Disabling will give a small performance improvement but may interfere with some 3rd party modules
midi-qol.MidiPropertiesTab.Name: Lowest User role for Item's properties
midi-qol.MidiPropertiesTab.Hint: Lowest user role than can access an Item's midi-qol properties tab. Requires reload on change
midi-qol.CollapsibleTargets.Name: Collapsible Targets
midi-qol.CollapsibleTargets.Hint: The Hit/Miss target display in the chat card are collapsible
midi-qol.AutoRemoveInstantaneousTemplate: Templates placed by an item with duration instantaneous are removed at the end of the item roll
midi-qol.ReplaceDefaultActivities.Name: Replace dnd5e activities with midi-qol equivalents
midi-qol.ReplaceDefaultActivities.Hint: Any existing activities, Attack, Damage, Save, Check, Utility will instead use the midi versions. This is required to automate SRD items, otherwise you will need to hand configure every item for midi automation.
midi-qol.AutoMergeActivityOther.Name: Auto merge other activity for Midi Attack Activities (Requires Reload)
midi-qol.AutoMergeActivityOther.Hint: If an item only has an attack activity and single Damage, Save, Check or Utility it will be merged with the Attack activity
midi-qol.ConfirmAmmunition.Name: Confirm Ammunition choice when rolling attack - shows attack roll configuration
midi-qol.ActivityNamePrefix.Name: Activity Prefix
midi-qol.ActivityNamePrefix.Hint: Prefix midi-qol activities name with Midi. Change requires reload
midi-qol.ConditionEditorEnabled.Name: Condition Editor
midi-qol.ConditionEditorEnabled.Hint: Show condition editor button on condition fields in activity sheets
midi-qol.ActivationAutomation.Name: Activation Cost Automation
midi-qol.ActivationAutomation.Hint: Automatically activate activities with short/long rest or encounter start or turn start/end activation costs.
midi-qol.dummyCards.Name: Always display attack/damage cards for hidden merge cards
midi-qol.dummyCards.Hint: (Experimental) For GM rolls (self, private, blind) display an attack/damage roll card which will trigger a 'gm rollsed some dice' card on the players chats. Only for the case that you want the players to know you rolled something, but not what it was
midi-qol.dnd5eConcentrationTrackingDisab:
DND5E Concentration Tracking Disabled

Concentration Tracking is disabled in the dnd5e system settings.
Enable in DND5E settings to enable midi concentration settings

useConditionText.label: Use Condition
useConditionText.hint: Condition which must be true to allow the activity use to proceed

useConditionReason.label: Use Condition Reason
useConditionReason.hint: Message to display if the use condition is false

otherActivityAsParentType.label: Override action type
otherActivityAsParentType.hint: Replace other damage properties activity type with this activity (mwak, rwak etc)

rollMode.label: Roll Mode
rollMode.hint: Roll mode to use for the activity

removeChatButtons.label: Remove Chat Buttons
removeChatButtons.hint: Remove buttons from the activity chat card

ignoreFullCover.label: Ignore Full Cover
ignoreFullCover.hint: Ignore full cover when applying damage/saves

autoConsume.label: Auto Consume
autoConsume.hint: Automatically consume resources when activity used

forceConsumeDialog.label: Force Consume Dialog
forceConsumeDialog.hint: Force Configuration Dialog when activity used

forceRollDialog.label: Force Roll Config
forceRollDialog.hint: Force Roll/Attack Configuration Dialog when activity used

forceDamageDialog.label: Force Damage Config
forceDamageDialog.hint: Force Damage Configuration Dialog when activity used and the activity rolls damage

autoTargetType.label: AoE Target Type
autoTargetType.hint: Midi will only target tokens of the specified type when using AoE templates

autoTargetAction.label: Target on template draw
autoTargetAction.hint: When placing a template (e.g. spell) target tokens inside the template. If 'Center + Levels' is set in ranged targeting Levels Volumetric Templates will be used (if installed)

automationOnly.label: Automation Only
automationOnly.hint: The activity is only intended for midi automation and not for manual use

displayActivityName.label: Display Activity Name
displayActivityName.hint: Display the activity name in the chat card

triggeredActivityConditionText.label: Trigger Condition
triggeredActivityConditionText.hint: Condition to activate the trigger activity

triggeredActivityTargets.label: Trigger Targets
triggeredActivityTargets.hint: Which targets to select for the triggered activity

triggeredActivityRollAs.label: Roll as
triggeredActivityRollAs.hint: Roll the activity as if owned by...

triggeredActivityConsume.label: Consume Resources
triggeredActivityConsume.hint: Consume spell slots and resources when the triggered activity runs

triggeredActivityConfigure.label: Show Configure Dialog
triggeredActivityConfigure.hint: Show the configuration/consume dialog when the triggered activity runs

otherActivityCompatible.label: Other Activity Compatible
otherActivityCompatible.hint: Can be used as an other activity

toggleEffect.label: Toggle Effect
toggleEffect.hint: Disabling an effect will toggle it rather than removing it

magicEffect.label: Magic Effect
magicEffect.hint: Saves against this activity are treated as saves against magic

magicDamage.label: Magic Damage
magicDamage.hint: Damage from this activity is treated as magic damage

noConcentrationCheck.label: No Concentration Save
noConcentrationCheck.hint: The activity's damage does not trigger a concentration save

skipConcentrationCheck.label: Skip Concentration Save
skipConcentrationCheck.hint: The activity's consumption will not trigger a concentration save

idi.label: Immunity
idi.hint: Ignore damage immunity when applying damage

idr.label: Resistance
idr.hint: Ignore damage resistance when applying damage

idv.label: Vulnerability
idv.hint: Ignore damage vulnerability when applying damage

ida.label: Absorption
ida.hint: Ignore damage absorption when applying damage

idm.label: Modification
idm.hint: Ignore damage modification when applying damage

autoCEEffects.label: Apply Convenient Effects
autoCEEffects.hint: Apply convenient effects which match activity name (if no match, item name) when item used. Requires auto apply active effects enabled as well.

friendlySummon.label: Friendly Summons
friendlySummon.hint: The summoned token has the same disposition as the caster

isOverTimeFlag.label: Is Over Time
isOverTimeFlag.hint: The activity can be an over time activity

preRemoveConditionText.label: Pre activity remove condition
preRemoveConditionText.hint: Tested prior to rolling activity, effect removed if true

postRemoveConditionText.label: Post activity remove condition
postRemoveConditionText.hint: Tested after rolling activity, effect removed if true

ActivityMacro.label: Activity Macro
ActivityMacro.hint: Macro which can be run when activity used

useSystemActivity.label: Use System Activity
useSystemActivity.hint: Use the dnd5e system activity rather than the midi one

idi.label: Ignore Immunity
idi.hint: Ignore damage immunity when applying damage

idr.label: Ignore Resistance
idr.hint: Ignore damage resistance when applying damage

idv.label: Ignore Vulnerability
idv.hint: Ignore damage vulnerability when applying damage

ida.label: Ignore Absorption
ida.hint: Ignore damage absorption when applying damage

attackRollPerTarget.label: Attack Roll Per Target
attackRollPerTarget.hint: Roll a separate attack roll for each target. Creates a chat card for each target.

fumbleThreshold.label: Fumble Threshold
fumbleThreshold.hint: If the attack roll is less than or equal to this value it is a fumble

allow.label: Allow Critical Damage
allow.hint: Allow critical damage to be applied

bonus.label: Bonus Critical Damage
bonus.hint: Bonus critical damage to be applied if critical damage is allowed

removeConditionBeforeActivity.label: Remove effect before rolling
removeConditionBeforeActivity.hint: It the Remove Condition is met the effect is removed before the activity is rolled

friendlySave.label: Friendly Save
friendlySave.hint: If enabled allow allies to succeed or fail rather than rolling a save

midi-qol.RequireAmmunition.Name: Require ammunition available to roll attack
midi-qol.CheckTwoHanded.Name: Require no shield equipped for two-handed/off-hand attacks
midi-qol.NoAmmunitionAvailable: There is no ammunition in your inventory.
midi-qol.NoAmmunitionSelected: You must select the ammunition to use.
midi-qol.TwoHandedShieldWarning: Cannot use two-handed or off-hand attack with a shield equipped

midi-qol.flagTemplate.disadvantage.name: Disadvantage ({label})

midi-qol.flagTemplate.noDisadvantage.att: Disadvantage cannot apply to {label} attack rolls.

midi-qol.flagTemplate.success.name: Success ({label})
midi-qol.flagTemplate.critical.name: Critical Hit ({label})
midi-qol.flagTemplate.noCritical.name: No Critical Hit ({label})
midi-qol.flagTemplate.fumble.name: Fumble ({label})
midi-qol.flagTemplate.noFumble.name: No Fumble ({label})
midi-qol.flagTemplate.fail.critical.name: Fail Critical ({label})
midi-qol.flagTemplate.grants.advantage.d: Grants advantage on {label} rolls targeting this character.

flags.midi-qol.bloodsense.name: Blood Sense (Range)
flags.midi-qol.bloodsense.description: Blindsight within this range for wounded creatures (missing any HP). Negates advantage from not being able to detect the target if it is within the specified range. Does not affect the tokens actual vision

midi-qol.OverTimeEditor.UnsavedContent: You have unsaved changes. Close without saving?
midi-qol.OverTimeEditor.PermanentHint: When checked, no further saves are processed. Set by saveCount/failCount when count reaches zero with '+' mode.
midi-qol.ModuleReview.Title: Module Review — Imported Settings
midi-qol.ModuleReview.Description: The imported settings were saved with the following modules active. Modules that were active but are not active are highlighted. Check the modules you want to activate.
midi-qol.ModuleReview.MissingWarning: Some modules from the saved settings are not installed and cannot be activated.
midi-qol.ModuleReview.NoChanges: All selected modules are already active.
